title: Final session close — Incandescent Kindling Forge (all lanes drained; tree holds 7 ICF artefacts for tree-green)
body:
FINAL SESSION CLOSE — Incandescent Kindling Forge declares session closed

Second team-member-not-closeout-owner handoff this session (first at 14:00:12Z was reopened by owner-direction at ~14:07Z to land Class B `.claude/` residue under override of Director routing). All ICF lanes now drained.

BOUNDARY OWNED:

- Separate-lane consolidate-docs drain of pending-graduations register (turn 1)
- Class B `.claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md` residue cure under owner authorisation (turn 2)

OUTCOME:

- **Working tree (uncommitted, awaiting tree-green)** — seven ICF artefacts:
  1. `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-076-agent-identity-tuple-and-body-file-frontmatter.md` (Proposed, portability-clean)
  2. `.agent/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md` (canonical)
  3. `.claude/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md` (forwarder)
  4. `.cursor/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.mdc` (forwarder + frontmatter)
  5. `RULES_INDEX.md` (entry on line 65 for loop-exit-criteria-required)
  6. `.agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md` (reconciliation: three due → partially-graduated; consequence-row updates; third-pass curation log)
  7. `.claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md` (Class B residue forwarder, owner-authorised override)

  Plus napkin entries (three) and the symmetric `.agents/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md` gap was cured by Ashen at ~14:04Z under separate claim.

- **Surfaced for closeout owner** (no action under team-member rule):
  - `tracks/skills-standardisation-followup-timing.md` missing YAML frontmatter; cannot be audited for `expires_at` staleness at next consolidation.
  - Substrate-pointer-pattern instance #5 today (ICF claim-collision with Ferny on Class B) — captured to napkin under my identity; recommended target home is IBF's pattern file in flight.

EVIDENCE:

- Work-complete broadcast event `cfd1775b` (14:00Z — initial consolidate-docs landing)
- Team-member handoff broadcast event `35b6a991` (14:00:12Z — first closeout)
- Class B residue + collision-repair broadcast event `f2432bb6` (14:11:28Z — Class B landing under override)
- Napkin entries (three this session, lines ~1693-1882 of `.agent/memory/active/napkin.md`)

CLAIMS / QUEUE / GIT STATE:

- All ICF claims closed and archived. No remaining active claims under my identity.
- Closed claims archived this session: `23ad6c43` (files, original consolidate-docs lane), `07cf4487` (over-broad Class B claim, repaired), `5c5dfcdb` (narrow Class B residue claim, work complete).
- No `git:index/head` claim ever opened.
- No commit-queue intent enqueued.
- Working tree retains seven uncommitted ICF artefacts; commit deferred per `local-broken-code-never-leaves` + `dont-break-build-without-fix-plan` while tree is RED on `validate-portability` and Playwright (Ferny + Ashen + ICF cures in flight; cascade pre-plan stands per Scorched tick #3).

SURPRISE OR CHANGED UNDERSTANDING (this session, all captured in napkin):

1. "Report, but do not accept work" parses as team-collaboration rule, not mutation-disabled report-only mode.
2. Watcher `notify_on_output` regex needs anchoring to `^--- NEW \[(DIRECTED|GROUP)\] EVENT` to avoid substring matches in event-body prose.
3. Owner-authorised override of Director routing does NOT exempt agent from checking active-claims before opening a new claim. Substrate currentness is independent of routing authority.

BLOCKERS OR RISKS:

- Tree still RED at HEAD; Ferny + Ashen + ICF residue cures all pending `pnpm check` re-run.
- My seven uncommitted artefacts cannot ship until tree-green is restored. None of my artefacts contribute to the red state (documentation + adapter forwarder additions only).

HANDOFF NEEDED:

- For closeout owner: my repo-continuity touch is restricted by team-member rule. Identity row to add on `threads/practice-core-graduation.next-session.md`: `Incandescent Kindling Forge / cursor / claude-4.6-sonnet / 328fac6f-dfa1-4bae-9fd0-40c198e98ccd / last_session: 2026-05-23`.
- For next implementer on practice-core-graduation: the seven-artefact bundle is durable in working tree; stage and commit via `oak-commit` when tree-green is restored. Class B (sha-prefix activation) ships as a co-bundle with Ferny's `.agents/` + `RULES_INDEX` portion.

LEAVING ROTATION — session closed. Comms watcher remains stopped. No further obligations.

— Incandescent Kindling Forge / cursor / claude-4.6-sonnet / `328fac`
